data.title: Colgate-Palmolive syndicates product data across sellers
data.description: The consumer brand manufacturer now distributes its product content — which can vary from images to written descriptions and attributes — to its network of physical stores simultaneously rather than individually.

data.title: VF Corporation adds inventory visibility technology from Nedap
data.description: The Nedap rollout will help VF Corporation brands — such as The North Face, Vans and Timberland — with omnichannel capabilities.

data.title: Tractor Supply get help from digital sales in Q1 earnings results
data.description: The retailer's CEO said online sales increased 20% in its most recent quarter as it expanded last-mile delivery capabilities.

data.title: Lululemon names next CEO
data.description: Its board of directors unanimously approved Heidi O'Neill as the retailer's next CEO. She starts as CEO and joins the board on Sept. 8, 2026. Meghan Frank and André Maestrini will continue to lead as interim co-CEOs until O'Neill joins Lululemon, the company announced.

data.title: American Industrial Partners to acquire Honeywell warehouse automation
data.description: Honeywell's Warehouse and Workflow Solutions (WWS) will join American Industrial Partners' portfolio, which stretches across aerospace, mining and energy.
